title: Claim (honiad)
description: An honiad asserts a value about an entity via a predicate (perthynas), with provenance and a confidence. This schema mirrors the claim-table contract the live awen-weave validator enforces (craidd.schema.validation.validate_claim + storage/ddl.py CHECK constraints, SCHEMA_VERSION v0.1). The canonical Welsh term for the predicate concept is perthynas, locked by Catrin Stephens 2026-05-19 (VOC-PERTHYNAS); the machine field name stays English (`predicate`) per the tutor's schema-identifiers-stay-English attestation. NB tier and source.kind are constitution/policy-layer classification attributes (see POL-TIERAB-001, SOV-003), NOT stored claim columns in v0.1 code — they are applied at classification/policy time, not carried on the claim row; see compatibility.md.

claim_id.description: Stable claim id (PK). Instance-scoped; the code does not constrain its format. Absent on the pre-insert validation shape, present on stored rows.

subject_id.description: Entity id this claim is about (FK to entity.entity_id).

predicate.description: The predicate/relationship (perthynas). FK to predicate.name; must be a registered predicate. Drawn from the controlled predicate set (awen-weave predicates.py); the Welsh concept term is perthynas (VOC-PERTHYNAS).

value_date.description: Precise date value for value_type=date (DDL DATE). Precision recorded via the date_precision qualifier.

value_geom.description: Geometry value for value_type=geom, carried as WKT (e.g. 'POINT(-3.886 52.741)'). Stored as GEOMETRY via the DuckDB spatial extension.

value_cy.description: Welsh value for value_type=bilingual (at least one of value_cy / value_en must be set).

value_en.description: English value for value_type=bilingual (at least one of value_cy / value_en must be set).

value_entity_ref.description: Entity id this claim points to, for value_type=entity_ref (FK to entity.entity_id).

qualifiers.description: Claim-level metadata map (stored as claim.qualifiers_json). Vocabularies enforced at the schema/validation layer, not by DDL CHECK.

source_id.description: Provenance: FK to a source entity (entity_type=source). Source metadata — licence, organisation, url, citation — lives as predicates on that entity, not inline here.

recorded_by.description: Curator/actor identity that recorded the claim (typically an email).

recorded_at.description: When the claim was recorded (DDL DEFAULT NOW()).

confidence.description: Curator confidence. DDL NOT NULL CHECK (high/medium/low). Distinct from the binding qualifier (how the value was derived).

evidence_uri.description: Optional pointer to evidence backing the claim.

superseded_by.description: claim_id of the claim that supersedes this one, if any (forward-additive; supersede, do not delete).

status.description: Claim lifecycle status. DDL NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active' CHECK.

qualifiers.description: The 14 v0.1 qualifier keys (awen-weave qualifiers.py QUALIFIER_KEYS). Unknown keys are rejected (closed key set). Closed-domain values must be in their set; open-domain values (dialect, floor_scope) are not rejected. Two cross-qualifier rules are enforced below.

dialect.description: OPEN domain — any ISO language code accepted. Known values: cy-GB-north (Dolgellau default), cy-GB-south, cy-GB-mid, cy-GB.

name_type.description: CLOSED domain. Required on every name_cy / name_en claim.

floor_scope.description: OPEN domain — free text accepted. Known values: whole, ground, first, upper, attic, basement. Used on tenancy and event claims.

date_precision.description: CLOSED domain. Used on claims carrying a value_date.

verification_method.description: CLOSED domain (§10 item 7). How a curator reached a verification decision.

geometry_basis.description: CLOSED domain (§10 item 7). Optional; how a geometry value was arrived at.

binding.description: CLOSED domain (Phase 2.1 §10 item 8). How the claim's value was derived. No default — a stated binding is always explicit. 'federated' requires source-of-record (see cross-rule).

verified_at.description: OPEN-form (§10 item 7). ISO-8601 date or datetime; validated by _validate_iso_date in validation.py.

field_session_id.description: OPEN-form (§10 item 7). Non-empty string; required when co_signed_by is present.

co_signed_by.description: OPEN-form (§10 item 7). Non-empty string. Requires field_session_id in the same qualifier set (co-sign needs a named session).

federated_from.description: OPEN-form (Phase 2.1). Source instance id for a federated read; required when binding=federated.

source_ran_at.description: OPEN-form (Phase 2.1). The SOURCE's own run-UTC (ISO-8601), read from its manifest — verify-not-recall. Required when binding=federated.

semantics_caveat.description: OPEN-form (0.1.3). A stated limit on what this claim's value MEANS, so meaning travels with the datum and cannot be silently over-claimed downstream (provenance-with-semantics). Advisory cross-rule (SHOULD, not enforced by schema): SHOULD be present on binding ∈ {derived, federated} where a meaning-limit exists. Amendment: amendments/2026-07-11-SCH-CLAIM-001-semantics-caveat.md.
